theorem.name: 8|N theorem
theorem.statement: The QA cosine correlator E_N(s,t)=cos(2pi(s-t)/N) achieves the CHSH Tsirelson bound |S|=2sqrt(2) if and only if 8 divides N.
theorem.model_note: The correlator is continuous-valued (not binary +/-1), constituting a valid deterministic local hidden-variable model. It evades Bell theorem constraints on binary pre-assignments. Verified by exhaustive search over all N^4 settings for N <= 32.

model_assessment.notes: The QA cosine correlator is a valid deterministic LHV model with continuous-valued outcomes. The 8|N theorem is verified by exhaustive search. Compare with the retracted I3322 implementation which used unconstrained independent correlators (MODEL_NOT_PHYSICALLY_REALIZABLE=True).
